positive: A whimsical, highly detailed, maximalist scene featuring a bioluminescent forest at twilight. The main subject is a stylized woodland creature—a fox merging with flora, whose silhouette is elegant and striking. Elements include glowing mushrooms, delicate ferns, and floating geometric lanterns. The style must be intricate, inspired by Art Nouveau and psychedelic fantasy illustration, utilizing deep sapphire blues, vibrant emerald greens, and glowing neon coral accents. Composition must be perfectly centered and contained, designed for high contrast screen printing on fabric. The lighting should be magical and diffused, emanating from the glowing flora, creating dramatic depth. Vector art quality, clean lines, isolated elements on a deep indigo background.
negative: blur, amateur, text, logo, watermark, signature, artifact, dirty, low quality, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, grain, poor composition
